tagline: This serverless compute release roughly corresponds to Databricks Runtime 18.0.
what_it_does: This serverless compute release roughly corresponds to Databricks Runtime 18.0. New features SQL scripting is now generally available: SQL scripting is now generally available. Redshift JDBC driver upgraded to 2.1.0.28: The Redshift JDBC driver has been upgraded to version 2.1.0.28.
why_it_matters: Shared isolation execution environment for Unity Catalog Python UDFs: Unity Catalog Python UDFs with the same owner can now share an isolation environment by default, improving performance and reducing memory usage.
plain_summary: This serverless compute release roughly corresponds to Databricks Runtime 18.0. New features SQL scripting is now generally available: SQL scripting is now generally available.

capabilities.title: stazimuth function: Returns the north-based
capabilities.desc: stazimuth function: Returns the north-based azimuth from the first point to the second in radians.

capabilities.title: stboundary function: Returns the boundary
capabilities.desc: stboundary function: Returns the boundary of the input geometry.

capabilities.title: stclosestpoint function: Returns the 2D
capabilities.desc: stclosestpoint function: Returns the 2D projection of a point on the first geometry closest to the second geometry.

capabilities.title: stgeogfromewkt function: Parses an Extended
capabilities.desc: stgeogfromewkt function: Parses an Extended Well-Known Text (EWKT) description of a geography.

key_takeaway: This serverless compute release roughly corresponds to Databricks Runtime 18.0.
